title: Wire Bureau review and Leitstand display boundary
goal: Register how heimlern proposals from Chronik outcomes move into Bureau review status and later Leitstand read-only display without making either surface the source of outcome truth.

acceptance.assertion: Bureau records proposal review state and follow-up decisions without storing raw Chronik outcome history.
Leitstand projection, if added, is read-only and displays source digest, freshness and proposal-only boundary language.
The design preserves Chronik history authority, Bureau task truth, heimlern proposal-only role and Grabowski execution authority.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
